cases.title: Bundle manifests and hashes
cases.expected_result: Every required bundled and third-party byte matches its manifest.

cases.title: Python and runtime availability
cases.expected_result: The pinned vendored runtime is present and reports the expected version.

cases.title: Exact startup and gameplay behavior
cases.expected_result: Startup, both instruction answers, movement, inventory, invalid input, and quit confirmation match golden output.

cases.title: Transcript replay and persistence
cases.expected_result: Separate reconstructions produce identical state and output.

cases.title: Request idempotency and conflict rejection
cases.expected_result: Identical retries replay once and conflicting or stale retries do not advance state.

cases.title: Independent session isolation
cases.expected_result: Two sessions cannot read or alter each other's state.

cases.title: Save command filesystem confinement
cases.expected_result: Traversal and absolute save paths create no filesystem entries.

cases.title: Pending-turn journal recovery
cases.expected_result: A controlled pending turn commits exactly once and clears its journal.
